package rulecoverage

func NegativeTransportMetricsEmittedFromRepositoryLayer() string {
    ruleID := "transport_metrics_emitted_from_repository_layer"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repositories that record HTTP-route or handler-oriented metrics."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
